title: Xtra Bitter Italian Seafood Pasta
description: A flexitarian friendly Italian dish featuring bitter and glassy jelly elements, perfect for midnight cravings. This recipe combines sea salt and dashi extract for a unique flavor.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the dashi extract and sea salt to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the kombu seaweed to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the canned tomatoes to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the shrimp to the skillet and cook until pink and fully cooked.
Drain the spaghetti and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the sauce.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional sea salt if desired.
